body:
### Description

Erroneously first reported in rust analyzer: https://github.com/rust-lang/rust-analyzer/issues/21737 but it turned to be an issue with nvim-lspconfig instead.

Using system installed Rust and trying to navigate to some standard type like `String` results in following error:
```
[rust_analyzer] cmd failed with code 101: table: 0x4485228447d8                                                                                                                                                                                                
error: failed to parse manifest at `/usr/lib/rustlib/src/rust/library/Cargo.toml`                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               
Caused by:                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     
  the cargo feature `profile-rustflags` requires a nightly version of Cargo, but this is the `stable` channel                                                                                                                                                  
  See https://doc.rust-lang.org/book/appendix-07-nightly-rust.html for more information about Rust release channels.                                                                                                                                           
  See https://doc.rust-lang.org/cargo/reference/unstable.html#profile-rustflags-option for more information about using this feature. 
```
and library sources are not parsed. That's because [is_library()](https://github.com/neovim/nvim-lspconfig/blob/2163c54bb6cfec53e3e555665ada945b8c8331b9/lsp/rust_analyzer.lua#L38-L53) does not consider `/usr/lib/rustlib/src/rust/library` as directory with library sources and attempt to determine workspace root:
https://github.com/neovim/nvim-lspconfig/blob/2163c54bb6cfec53e3e555665ada945b8c8331b9/lsp/rust_analyzer.lua#L78-L100
fails because even stable Rust versions use unstable cargo features in library Cargo.toml files
title: rust_analyzer: going to type definition in standard library results in failure
